issue: audit finding: bootstrap_auprc_gain with score_col compares C-vs-M (direct), not the pre-specified M+C-vs-M (incremental)
resolution: The pre-specified incremental test (M+C vs M, logistic on magnitude + residual axis-specificity + residual donor-coherence) gives gain +0.357 [+0.117,+0.538], P>0=1.000 — CI excludes zero, STRONGER than the direct C-vs-M comparison (+0.248 [-0.043,+0.467]) that was previously reported as the headline. Correcting the test to the one actually pre-specified does not weaken the result; it strengthens it. Headline should be M+C-vs-M.
